[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [NextQueriesConfig](./x-components.nextqueriesconfig.md) &gt; [hideSessionQueries](./x-components.nextqueriesconfig.hidesessionqueries.md)

## NextQueriesConfig.hideSessionQueries property

Hides the next queries if it has been already searched during the session.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
hideSessionQueries: boolean;
```

## Example 1

When set to true:

```
query = 'shorts';
query = 'trousers';
suggestions = ['t-shirt', 'shorts', 'dress']
// Suggests ['t-shirt', 'dress']
```

## Example 2

When set to false:

```
query = 'shorts';
query = 'trousers';
suggestions = ['t-shirt', 'shorts', 'dress']
// Suggests ['t-shirt', 'shorts', 'dress']
```
